Footer.about_description: We are committed to providing the latest medical solutions and advanced equipment to elevate healthcare standards. Your trusted partner in the journey of wellness.

Hero.title: Quality Healthcare Begins Here

AboutSummary.subtitle: Who We Are
AboutSummary.title: Your Trusted Reference for Medical Supplies
AboutSummary.description: We believe healthcare starts with quality. Our mission is to simplify access to certified medical supplies for individuals and healthcare facilities, adhering to the highest safety standards for a sustainable journey of wellness.

Services.title: Our Premium Services
Services.subtitle: Integrated Medical Solutions
Services.description: We offer a comprehensive range of services to meet the needs of the medical sector and individuals with the highest quality standards.

items.medical_centers_desc: Complete setup for physiotherapy and rehabilitation centers with the latest sports and therapeutic equipment.
items.clinics_desc: Providing all medical supplies for private clinics and school clinics, ensuring a safe and fully equipped health environment.
items.equipment_desc: We provide the latest medical technologies and devices for diagnosis and treatment, ensuring quality and compliance.
items.supplies_desc: Supply of all medical consumables (gloves, masks, sterilization tools) for facilities and individuals.
items.homecare_desc: Everything a patient needs at home, from wheelchairs to assistive devices, delivered to your doorstep.
items.logistics_desc: Strong logistics network to deliver orders across the Kingdom and the Gulf safely and quickly.

AboutUs.hero_subtitle: your partner in the journey of wellness
AboutUs.story_text_1: At Rahma Medical, we believe healthcare starts with providing reliable, safe, and accessible medical products for every home and facility.
AboutUs.story_text_2: We carefully select our products to meet the needs of individuals and healthcare facilities, ensuring a seamless buying experience.
AboutUs.vision_desc: To be the first choice and trusted reference for all medical solutions in the Kingdom.
AboutUs.mission_desc: Providing the latest medical technologies with fair prices and exceptional after-sales service.
AboutUs.values_desc: Our principles guide our decisions, and we adhere to them in every interaction.
AboutUs.goal_1_desc: Raising the quality standards of the local health sector with certified products.
AboutUs.goal_2_desc: To be the comprehensive choice for any medical facility by providing integrated services.
AboutUs.goal_3_desc: Delivering an ideal customer experience every time, from order to after-sales.
AboutUs.goal_4_desc: To be proactive in knowledge regarding the latest developments in medical technology.
AboutUs.cta_desc: Our team is ready to answer your inquiries and meet your needs with the highest quality standards.

Services2.hero_subtitle: Providing integrated medical solutions from establishment to home supply, according to the highest Saudi and global standards.
Services2.service_1_desc: Complete furnishing solutions for major hospitals, including vital departments, operating rooms, and ICUs with the latest technologies.
Services2.service_2_desc: Providing the latest physiotherapy and motor rehabilitation equipment to equip specialized centers ensuring best patient outcomes.
Services2.service_3_desc: Equipping private clinics (Dental, Derma, Ophthalmology) with diagnostic and treatment equipment befitting your service level.
Services2.service_4_desc: Establishing primary clinics within schools, universities, and companies according to Ministry of Health regulations.
Services2.service_5_desc: Reaching you anywhere with a comprehensive range of medical supplies for individuals (wheelchairs, monitors, consumables) for home comfort.
Services2.service_6_desc: Fast shipping and supply services covering all KSA regions and the Gulf states, ensuring product safety during transport.
Services2.cta_title: Planning to equip your medical facility?
Services2.cta_desc: Our engineering and consulting team is ready to provide a comprehensive study of your needs.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
content: Rahma respects the privacy of its website visitors and is committed to protecting any information collected during the use of the website.
We collect limited information only when you submit a contact form or send an inquiry, such as your name, contact number, and email address.
This information is used solely to respond to inquiries, for professional communication, and to improve the website content.
We do not use it for unsolicited marketing, and we do not sell or share personal data with third parties.
The website may use cookies to enhance user experience and analyze traffic in a general and non-identifiable manner.
We take appropriate measures to protect personal information from unauthorized access or misuse.
The website may contain links to external websites, and we are not responsible for their privacy policies.
Users have the right to request access, modification, or deletion of their personal data, or to stop further communication at any time.
This privacy policy may be updated from time to time, and any changes will be published on this page.
Privacy.contact: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at: info@rahmamedical.com

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
content: By using the Rahma website, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions.
The website is intended to provide informational and corporate content about Rahma and its services and does not function as an online store or sales platform.
All content on the website, including text, designs, and logos, is the property of Rahma and may not be copied, used, or reproduced without prior permission.
Rahma strives to ensure the accuracy of the information provided but does not guarantee that the content is error-free or complete at all times.
Rahma shall not be held liable for any misuse of the information on the website or for any damages resulting from such use.
The website may contain links to external websites, and Rahma is not responsible for their content or usage policies.
Rahma reserves the right to modify these terms and conditions at any time. Updates will be published on this page.
Terms.contact: For inquiries regarding these terms and conditions, please contact: info@rahmamedical.com
